response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile senior engineer with genuine geospatial experience (founder of GISCollective, a geo-data mapping platform used by Green Map, plus a FOSS4G talk) and proven low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second with async I/O and fibers. However, that systems work was in DLang rather than C++ or Rust, his documented C/C++ experience is brief and dates to 2015, and his recent roles are TypeScript/Node full-stack product work. He has no direct routing, tiling, or navigation-pipeline experience, so the core skill match is adjacent rather than direct.
strengths: Real geospatial domain experience: founded and operates an open-source geo-data platform (GISCollective) used in production
High-performance systems background: low-latency, async I/O microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Broad, adaptable engineer with strong testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, Linux, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: Modern C++ experience is thin and dated (~7 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015); no Rust experience listed
No direct experience with routing engines, map-tile generation, or navigation guidance systems
Recent years focused on TypeScript/Node web product work, away from systems-level development
